description_long: This is a large, cylindrical plastic juice container with a wide, transparent screw cap at the top. The body of the container is decorated with vibrant, high-contrast images of green, bumpy-skinned fruits that resemble cherimoya or soursop, along with some yellow-green fruit segments and a silvery-gray fruit. The label wraps around the entire surface, with the fruit illustrations dominating the visual appearance and no visible text or branding. The plastic material is slightly glossy, giving the container a clean and modern look. The cap is ribbed for grip and appears to be made of a clear or translucent plastic. The overall design suggests a product meant to attract attention with its bold fruit imagery.
description: A large, glossy plastic juice bottle with a clear screw cap, covered in vivid images of green and yellow fruits. The label features no visible branding, focusing on the fruit illustrations.
description_view_0: The front view shows the clear screw cap and a prominent cluster of green, bumpy fruits with a white background.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the continuation of the green fruit imagery, with the cap slightly angled and more of the label's wrap visible.
description_view_2: This view reveals a transition from green fruit to a silvery-gray fruit, with the cap opening clearly visible.
description_view_3: The back view displays a large silvery-gray fruit and some yellow-green fruit segments, with less green fruit visible.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: green bumpy fruits, silvery-gray fruit, yellow-green fruit segments
